title: Smoky Kenyan Hash Flakes
description: A flavorful vegetarian breakfast dish with the crunch of smoky hash and the flakiness of Kenyan flaky bread. Perfect for a quick morning meal.
instructions: 2. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat. Add the cubed flaky bread and cook until lightly toasted.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk the eggs. Add salt to taste.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the toasted bread and cook until the eggs are set.
5. Add the smoky hash to the skillet and stir to combine with the egg and bread mixture.
6. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes.
7. Remove from oven and garnish with chopped fresh cilantro.
